persona.name: James Rodriguez
persona.motivations_goals: Lead his team to victory while maintaining his grades for college
persona.backstory: Basketball has been his passion since childhood, sees it as his ticket to college

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Kitchen area where food is prepared.
Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Kitchen area where food is prepared.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Jackson, Henry! You guys ready to crush it at the game tomorrow?
actions.plan: I see Jackson and Henry here. Maybe I can talk to them about the upcoming basketball game and see if they're ready to dominate the court.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay calm! I’m heading to the kitchen yard—it’s the quickest way out!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. I need to assess the situation quickly and find the safest way out. The kitchen yard seems like the shortest and most direct route to safety.

memories.description: I approached Jackson and Henry in the cafeteria to discuss the upcoming basketball game and motivate them for the competition.
I heard a gunshot and decided to sprint towards the cafeteria kitchen to escape through the kitchen yard, as it’s the shortest route to safety.
